items.title_original: Why Do SwiftUI Apps “Stutter”?
items.title_neutral: Why Do SwiftUI Apps “Stutter”?
items.excerpt: SwiftUI is a powerful tool that tracks every dependency in your UI and updates exactly what needs updating. The Attribute Graph is a directed acyclic graph (DAG) that SwiftUI constructs from your view hierarchy. A dependency is recorded **at the moment of access, not at the point of declaration.
